_comment: Schema for ViTaL reward visualizer. Path: static/reward_data/{task}/trial_{N}.json
_notes: All four *_frames arrays are optional; placeholder images shown if omitted.
visual_phases and tactile_phases can each have 1–5 entries.
gt_reward = reward computed from real observations.
pred_reward = reward computed from world-model predicted observations.
Visual and tactile plots use independent Y-axes (auto-scaled per data).
solid line = GT, dashed line = Predicted; colour encodes the phase.
